source.name: Playwright Best Practices
source.license_notes: Summarized guidance with source link; do not copy full docs.

goal: Capture useful evidence and debug data when browser automation succeeds or fails.
steps: Take screenshots at major milestones and on failure.
Capture console errors and page errors when debugging.
Use Playwright trace viewer for deep failures instead of relying only on screenshots.
Log current URL, title, visible state, and key selector statuses.
verification: Trace or log path reported if captured
safety_notes: Do not include secrets/tokens in screenshots or logs if avoidable.

quality.notes: Playwright best practices mention trace viewer; evidence protocol added locally.

retrieval.ai_summary: Automation reports should include screenshots/assertions, current URL/title, console/page errors when relevant, and trace/log references for failures.
